Class SFSArray

java.lang.Object
com.smartfoxserver.v2.entities.data.SFSArray
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISFSArray, Iterable<SFSDataWrapper>
Direct Known Subclasses:
SFSArrayLite
public class SFSArray extends Object implements ISFSArray
